① Signal
Signal
Over 4.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 5.3K vs 4.5. 58% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Hancock sits around league average on whiff rate (23.2%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. CH is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. CLE is a good matchup — 24.52% MIX-K above LG, lineup vulnerability is a real tailwind. High variance (σ3.3K) — ceiling and floor are both real.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 5.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓CH converts two-strike counts (27% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Sharp command (2.0 BB/9) — every PA counts and he's not giving away bases
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.6 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗High variance (σ3.3K) — his floor is well below projection

✗Variance on any given start (σ2.1K) — projection is a median, not a floor

① Signal
Signal
Lean over 6.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Marginal over edge (7.3K vs 6.5), 57% conviction — take it reduced.
Brown is above average on whiff rate (26.7%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. CU is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. DET is a good matchup — 25.64% MIX-K above LG, lineup vulnerability is a real tailwind. Moderate variance (σ1.9K) — no major consistency flags.
⚠ Best value at the 6.5 alt line vs the 8.0 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓CU converts two-strike counts (32% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 4.8 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗Control is a problem (5.1 BB/9) — walks eat PA and he works from behind in counts
✗First-pitch strike rate (54%) is low — he'll work from behind and generate weak contact, not Ks

L4.5

① Signal
Signal
Under 4.5 is the play.1.5 units
Strong under signal — 92% model probability below 4.5 at 2.3K projected.
Littell is below average on swing-and-miss (14.9% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. Putaway pitch (SW) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. BAL is roughly neutral — 23.94% MIX-K close to league average. He's cooled off recently — factor into your confidence.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 3.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 5.5) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Weak finishing pitch (SW at 18% putaway) — survives on weak contact, not strikeouts
✓Short average outing (4.6 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗K/9 of 5.5 means enough talent to reach 4.5 in a deep outing

① Signal
Signal
Under 4.5 is the play.1.5 units
Strong under signal — 90% model probability below 4.5 at 2.4K projected.
Aldegheri is below average on swing-and-miss (19.6% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. FC is a serviceable finishing pitch, not dominant in two-strike counts. ATH is an excellent matchup — 27.45% MIX-K well above LG. Lineup swings against his mix. Moderate variance (σ1.6K) — no major consistency flags.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 3.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 5.8) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Short average outing (4.2 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗K/9 of 5.8 means enough talent to reach 4.5 in a deep outing

Under 4.5 is the play.1.5 units

Rocker sits around league average on whiff rate (24.8%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. CH is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. ① Signal
Signal
Lean under 4.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Under edge present (3.3K vs 4.5), 27% confidence — lean only.
Civale is below average on swing-and-miss (20.3% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. SL is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. LAA is a good matchup — 25.4% MIX-K above LG, lineup vulnerability is a real tailwind. Very consistent output (σ1.4K) — model projection is reliable here.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 4.0 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 6.6) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Elite first-pitch strike rate (66%) — batters put the ball in play early, not deep counts
✓Short average outing (4.7 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗SL is an out pitch (24% putaway) — if he gets deep in counts, Ks follow

Model projects 5.9K vs 5.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Sheehan generates genuine swing-and-miss (30.4% WHF, above LG) — stuff can pile up Ks when working. CU is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. SD is roughly neutral — 23.24% MIX-K close to league average. High variance (σ2.7K) — ceiling and floor are both real.
⚠ Best value at the 5.5 alt line vs the 6.0 market main — be on the right number.

① Signal
Signal
Pass.Pass
Model projects 3.8K vs 3.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Avila sits around league average on whiff rate (24.7%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. CH is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. CWS is roughly neutral — 23.74% MIX-K close to league average. Moderate variance (σ2.0K) — no major consistency flags.
⚠ Best value at the 3.5 alt line vs the 5.0 market main — be on the right number.

K Props · F5 · NRFI · methodology + weightings · v9.9 tiering
📈 Live Performance — through 2026-06-27 · 116 bets
60.3%
WIN RATE
70–46
+10.3%
ROI · $+874
MAE 2.02K
1.79σ
EDGE CONF
n=116 · need more
Overall 70–46 · bias +0.64K
60%
Overs 35–18 · bias +0.53K
66%
Unders 35–28 · bias +0.72K
55%
STRONG 10–2
83%
MOD 13–9
59%
LEAN O 14–6
70%
LEAN U 32–27
54%
⚠ Bias note: Projections run +0.64K overall. Under bias +0.72K — actuals beat proj by ~0.7K on avg when fading. Overs 66% vs unders 56%. Option A + blended LG baseline (Jun 26) reducing bias over time.
EDGE CONF 1.79σ = standard deviations above random chance (52% breakeven). >1.96σ → 95% confident the edge is real · >2.58σ → 99% confident. Current 116 bets: 95% CI = [51.4%–69.2%].
❓ CAP — Model Confidence Score
CAP = overall strength of evidence (0–100%). NOT win probability — measures how aligned the signals are. Used in tiering: STRONG ≥ 62% · MOD ≥ 58%.
≥80% all signals align · 55–70% edge exists, mixed — size down · <55% thin confidence.
① P(over) — Poisson probability of clearing the line
~40%
② Edge size — raw Ks above / below the line
~30%
③ σ stability — variance penalty on volatile pitchers
~20%
④ Blend quality — depth of L10 data vs prior weight
~10%
⚡ K Props — Strikeout Projection v9.9
6-step formula — runs in this order every session:
① Normalise L10: adj_k = raw_k × (21.51 / opp_K%)
② Scale K/9 to avg IP per start
③ σ-blend: σ≤1.2 → 75/25 · σ≤2.2 → 70/30 · σ>2.2 → 58/42 (L10/K9)
④ 5-factor base_proj (whiff · fps · putaway · arsenal · park)
⑤ OPP BLEND: 60% MIX-K% (normalised) + 40% BBRef K%
⑥ rm_raw = opp_kpct_eff ÷ LG_blend · HARD ow=1.00 · EASY ow=0.65
Adj L10 base · opp-normalised · σ-driven blend
32%
Whiff% vs lg avg (25%) — strongest Statcast K predictor
22%
OPP BLEND: 60% MIX-K% (arsenal-normalised) + 40% BBRef
18%
Putaway% vs lg avg (19%) — 2-strike whiff rate
11%
FPS% vs lg avg (63%) — command drives deep counts
9%
Park factor (2.0 − park) — small but real
6%
σ variance penalty — volatile pitchers capped lower
2%
MIX-K% Option A: batter K% per pitch type ÷ LG avg for that type → rescaled to 21.51%. Removes suppression on SI=11.96% / CU=14.09% pitchers vs SW=29.44% / CB=29.73%. Constants: 4S=21.98% · SI=11.96% · CH=23.14% · CU=14.09% · SL=27.12% · SW=29.44% · CB=29.73% · SF=25.88%
STRONG edge≥+1.5K · P(O)≥25% · CAP≥62% · 2u · MOD edge≥+0.5K · P(O)≥15% · CAP≥58% · 1–1.5u
LEAN O edge≥+0.5K · CAP≥45% · 0.5u · LEAN U edge≤−1.0K · CAP≥20% · 0.5u
UNDER edge≤−1.0K · CAP≥58% · 1u (1.5u if CAP≥65 + σ≤2)
🔴 F5 — First 5 Innings v9.9
blended_ERA = 0.65 × season_ERA + 0.35 × L3_ERA (live from kdata)
sp_r = (blended_ERA / 4.50) × 2.5 × park × fps_adj
lineup_r = (wRC+ / 100) × (L10_RPG / 4.35) × 2.42
F5_runs = sp_r × 0.50 + lineup_r × 0.50
SP: blended ERA (65% season + 35% L3) × park × FPS adj
50%
Lineup wRC+ vs pitcher handedness (lg avg 100)
25%
Opponent L10 R/G vs lg avg (4.35)
25%
🔁 Daily Pipeline — Locked Execution Order v9.9
Every session runs in this exact order — no manual steps between calls.
PRE-SESSION (manual inputs):
① Fill yesterday's actuals from confirmed box scores
② Fetch kdata JSON → k-props.vercel.app/api/kdata
③ Fetch lineups → rotowire.com (9 batters + hand per team)
④ Paste Ballpark Pal expanded view → parse BP_LINES
⑤ [weekly] Upload Savant CSVs → inject ars_pitches into PITCHER_META

SESSION BUILD — run_session_build():
A load_schedule_xlsx + parse_pitchers_from_json → pitcher list
B session_build() → baseline projection (L10, sigma, blend, wRC+, park)
C Inject real lineups → builtins._RECENT_LINEUPS
D Apply BP_LINES → alt_lines_real (field='fd', not 'fd_over')
E Re-run proj_k_v99 with real lineups → mix_kpct, bbref_kpct, opp_kpct_eff
F best_line_tier_175 → tier_k, best_line, best_cap per pitcher
G Force pass + sync CSS for no-candidate pitchers
H over_odds / under_odds from alt_lines_real at best_line
I ep = Poisson P(over best_line) per pitcher
J _finalize_pitchers — ONE call, all fields set
K Post-finalize sync: pass display + under_odds insurance

ASSEMBLE — assemble_index():
→ Builds all cards · injects CSS · writes index.html · saves RESULTS.json
→ No manual post-processing — one call produces final output
🎯 NRFI / YRFI — First Inning v9.9
λ_base = f(ERA, FPS%, WHIP, park)
woba_ratio = top4_lineup_avg_woba ÷ 0.318 (LG avg)
λ_adj = λ_base × (0.70 + 0.30 × woba_ratio)
P(NRFI) = e^(−λ_away) × e^(−λ_home)
Pitcher: ERA · FPS% · WHIP → Poisson λ base
70%
Top-4 lineup woba ÷ 0.318 LG avg (Savant, fresh daily)
30%
NRFI ≥62% · NRFI lean 57–61% · Skip 43–56% · YRFI ≤42%
Top-4 hitters with Savant woba. Danger ≥.400 · Watch ≥.360 · Manageable <.360
📐 Implied Odds Box
Poisson (λ = proj K) → probability + American odds per alt line threshold.
BET row = our recommended line. MKT row = market main (~+100 crossover).
⚠ bet · mkt N in card summary = our line differs from market — be on the right number.
P(K ≥ n) = 1 − Σ(k=0 to n−1) [e^−λ × λ^k / k!]
P≥50%: −round(P/(1−P)×100) · P<50%: +round((1−P)/P×100)
📡 Data Sources
✓ Real (API) — L10 K counts · pitch counts · season ERA/K9/BB9/WHIP · FanDuel alt lines + odds
✓ Savant CSV — batter woba/K%/PA per pitch type (572 batters) · pitcher arsenal whiff%/FPS%/putaway%
⚠ Researched — team wRC+ · L10 R/G · park factors · bullpen ERA · BBRef K% splits (updated Jun 8)
✗ Gaps — L10 opponents (API returns ? → falls back to raw avg) · live Statcast splits · real-time lineup changes
↑
